case_title: XUAN H NGUYEN VS. QUAN NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, QUAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, XUAN H AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, QUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, XUAN H AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, QUAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED JUN-06-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, QUAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DENISE MANGUYEN--MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER--- MARK FRANKLIN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL RE: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION L.R. 18.0 SENT TO PLAINTIFF -MOVED
